title: polygala amara var. calcarea
intro: Polygala amara var. calcarea, also known as European bitter milkwort, is a plant species in the Polygalaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory activities. The health benefits of Polygala amara var. calcarea include its potential to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
